title: Product Commercial Template 089
desc: Reusable product commercial prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a high-energy and dynamic tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic product commercial image of a fantasy character with cloak in a quiet cafe interior. Use 50mm framing, soft window light, and pastel pink and sky blue color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a high-energy and dynamic emotional tone.
